title: aidev Milestones
description: AI-derived intermediate states between project start and goal completion. Generated from goal.md on first run, updated as milestones are verified.

title.description: One-line description of the verifiable state this milestone represents

acceptanceCriteria.description: Human-readable criteria — each maps to a verifyCmd or a manual check

verifyCmd.description: Shell command that exits 0 when this milestone is met. Omit for manual-only milestones.

status.description: Updated by aidev after each verifyCmd run

lane.description: Which task lane primarily advances this milestone

dependsOn.description: IDs of milestones that must be 'done' before this one can be attempted

lastVerified.description: ISO timestamp of the last time verifyCmd was run

failureCount.description: How many consecutive times verifyCmd has failed. Triggers escalation at threshold.

notes.description: Free-form notes from the last agent run — findings, blockers, partial progress

examples.title: TypeScript compiles clean
acceptanceCriteria: npm run typecheck exits 0 with no errors

examples.title: Unit tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: Flash detector correctly identifies ≥3 Hz transitions

examples.title: Smoke tests pass against live Electron window
Flash-block interventions fire correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Saturated red flash fixture triggers intervention
Intervention UI does not itself flash
